articles.title: Who is Austin Hedges’ Girlfriend? All about Lexi Dickinson and their romantic baseball love story
articles.description: The relationship between Austin Hedges and Lexi Dickinson develops through their authentic connection, which people can easily understand. Their relationship begins with a silent courtship, which leads to their public proposal. Hedge's career at Cleveland will continue to attract fan interest in both his professional achievements and his personal activities.

articles.title: The DJI Ban Just Got Real: You Can’t Buy the Osmo Pocket 4 in the US
articles.description: Despite meaningful upgrades, the DJI Osmo Pocket 4 won't launch in the US due to ongoing FCC authorization issues.

articles.title: Rev Leslie Clifford D’Souza ordained as Bishop of Udupi Diocese
articles.description: Udupi: The episcopal ordination and consecration celebration of Rev Leslie Clifford D'Souza as second Bishop of Udupi Diocese took place at Milagres C.

articles.title: Treatment continues for trapped wild elephant
articles.description: Mysuru: The foresters continued treatment for a 25-year-old female wild elephant that was stuck in the reservoir slush at Hanur taluk of Chamarajanaga.

articles.title: See drug activity? Scan QR code to report anonymously to Mysuru police
articles.description: Mysuru: City police have launched a dedicated QR code-based system — Anonymous Drug Complaint Portal for Students — to help students report drug abuse.

articles.title: A first: Dog squad tracks wild elephants in Hassan
articles.description: Hassan: Forest department has introduced the Elephant Anti-Depredation Dog Squad (EaDDS) in Hassan to improve early warning and tracking of wild eleph.

articles.title: Tension in Gejjalagere over black flag protest bid
articles.description: Mandya: Tension prevailed in Gejjalagere village of Maddur taluk on Monday following an attempted black-flag protest targeting MLA K M Uday.Villagers,.

articles.title: 'Poor Victims Rarely Get Justice': Madras HC Orders Fresh Probe Into 5-Year-Old’s Death In School
articles.description: The case came before the court after the child’s father sought transfer of the probe to the CB-CID.

articles.title: Awareness prog on cervical cancer, its prevention by cyclist
articles.description: Mountaineer and cyclist Sameera Khan is conducting an awareness program for girl students in Odisha, focusing on health and empowerment. Her campaign highlights the importance of HPV vaccination to prevent cervical cancer, aiming to make this vital health knowledge accessible, especially in rural areas.

articles.title: Tilak ton breathes life into MI's flailing campaign
articles.description: MI hand GT their heaviest defeat - by 99 runs - to jump up to seventh in the standings

articles.title: Shah Rukh Khan’s King Unfazed By Avengers: Doomsday And Dune Clash? Trade Experts Reveal
articles.description: Trade experts say Shah Rukh Khan’s King is unlikely to be affected by Avengers: Doomsday and Dune clash, citing strong fan demand and massive box office pull.

articles.title: Iran Urges Accountability for US and Israel Through BRICS, SCO and UN
articles.description: Iran is in constant contact with Russia and China regarding the conflict around Iran, Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmail Baghaei said on Monday.

articles.description: Not Netflix, Ranveer Singh’s Dhurandhar 2 Bags Rs 150 Crore OTT Deal With This Platform

articles.title: Runner Loses Delaware Marathon By 2 Seconds After Premature Celebration, Video Goes Viral
articles.description: Users wrote that never celebrate until "you're across the line."

articles.title: Drones, robots & precision fire: How Ukraine is defying Russian juggernaut, reinventing modern warfare
articles.description: Ukraine is showcasing remarkable resilience against Russia through its innovative defense industry. The nation is producing millions of drones, long-range missiles, and robotic systems. These advanced weapons allow Ukraine to strike deep behind enemy lines and preserve its soldiers. This technological prowess is enabling Ukraine to effectively counter a larger adversary, demonstrating a new model of national resistance.

articles.title: IPL 2026: Australia's Josh Inglis set to join LSG camp ahead of MI game
articles.description: Inglis has missed the opening phase of the tournament after scheduling his wedding in April

articles.title: John Cena To Brock Lesnar: 4 WWE Legends Who Have Retired Since Wrestlemania 41
articles.description: John Cena and Brock Lesnar are among the WWE legends who have retired since Wrestlemania 41. Lesnar stunned one and all by retiring at Wrestlemania 42.

articles.title: ‘He asked me about my honeymoon’: TCS women employee alleges Nashik BPO ordeal
articles.description: The victim is among more than half a dozen women who have levelled allegations of sexual harassment and forced religious conversion at TCS Nashik.

articles.title: Can India Implement Strict Age Verification On Social Apps Without Breaking Privacy?
articles.description: Social media poses significant risks for children, prompting countries like Australia to ban access for those under 16 and the European Union to implement a stringent age verification app.

articles.title: KKR players were in tears after maiden IPL 2026 win over RR, reveals Varun Chakravarthy
articles.description: With a three-wicket haul for just 14 runs, Chakaravarthy won Player of the Match, and emotions were running high.

articles.title: Why B2B marketers need to think video first: key insights from the SaaS CMO Circle
articles.description: In the latest episode of the SaaS CMO Circle podcast, top marketing thinkers from LinkedIn and Zoho reveal how B2B video content is engaging buyers and helping to close deals in ways that traditional static content can’t. Traditional B2B marketing tactics revolve around content that buyers read. From product brochures and how-to guides through to case study PDFs, thought leadership blog posts, and detailed research reports, the core of B2B has involved exchanging written information for contact details. It’s text that does the heavy lifting at every stage of the marketing funnel.

articles.title: Sikkim State Lottery Result Today (April 20): Labhlaxmi Bliss 4 PM and Dear Legend 6 PM Lucky Draw Winners
articles.description: Sikkim state officials will announce winners for the afternoon Labhlaxmi Bliss draw as well as the evening Dear Legend draw today, April 20, 2026. Ticket holders who participated in either session will soon learn whether their numbers have been selected for a cash reward.

articles.title: Swiggy moves headquarters from Bellandur to Whitefield in Bengaluru
articles.description: Moneycontrol was the first to report that Swiggy was planning the move, driven by better metro connectivity, relatively affordable housing and easier access to talent

articles.title: ‘He put humanity first’: Family remembers local hero who saved tourists in Pahalgam
articles.description: One year since the Pahalgam terror attack claimed 26 lives, the family of hero pony operator Adil Hussain Shah reflects on his sacrifice and their struggle.

articles.title: 'You deserve a National Award': Bharathiraja praises Raadhika’s Performance in ‘Thaai Kizhavi’, actress responds with heartfelt promise
articles.description: Veteran filmmaker Bharathiraja praised actress Raadhika Sarathkumar's performance in her film 'Thaai Kizhavi'. Raadhika visited Bharathiraja as he recovers from a health scare. She expressed her gratitude, promising to seek his blessings if she receives a National Award. This interaction highlights their enduring bond and the respect Bharathiraja commands in the film industry. Several personalities visited him during his recovery.

articles.title: Rapido ride turned horror experience: Woman shares driver`s inappropriate messages; company apologises
articles.description: Rapido issued a public apology, describing the driver's conduct “unethical” and “completely unacceptable.”

articles.title: Tsunami Alert After 7.4-Magnitude Quake Strikes Japan
articles.description: A powerful earthquake struck off off the northern Japanese coast on Monday.

articles.title: India, South Korea to upgrade trade pact, deepen tech and supply chain ties
articles.description: India and South Korea will resume talks to upgrade their economic partnership agreement. The goal is to increase bilateral trade to 50 billion dollars by 2030. Both nations will also enhance cooperation in critical technologies and supply chains. An economic security dialogue will be established. Discussions will cover shipbuilding, steel, and sustainability. Industrial collaboration will expand through new agreements.

articles.title: New video shows US troops' 6-hr dramatic operation to hijack Iran civilian ship amid Hormuz blockade
articles.description: The U.S. military has released new footage showing American forces seizing the Iranian-flagged ship Touska during the night of April 19-20, in a dramatic escalation linked to Washington’s blockade of Iranian ports. According to the U.S. military’s account, the guided-missile destroyer USS Spruance disabled the vessel’s propulsion after repeated warnings, following which U.S. Marines boarded from the air and took custody of the ship.

articles.title: ‘Victim is alive, where is suicide?’: Karnataka HC orders release of man jailed for ‘abetting’ wife’s death
articles.description: The accused was in jail for the last 6 months over an abetment to suicide charge.

articles.title: Allu Arjun likely to shift to Mumbai for 'Raaka's' long and intense shoot
articles.description: Raaka movie: Allu Arjun may move to Mumbai for a long, demanding Raaka shoot, reducing travel from Hyderabad. The Atlee directorial stars Deepika Padukone, with rumours of Shah Rukh Khan cameo, and is targeting a 2027 release. Production remains on track as per reports

articles.title: 'Monumental setback' for Modi's foreign policy: Congress on Pakistan's role in US-Iran peace moves
articles.description: US-Iran talks: Congress attacks Modi government as Pakistan hosts key negotiations, calling it a setback for India’s foreign policy. Jairam Ramesh cites Asim Munir’s US outreach, questions India’s diplomatic strategy amid regional tensions.

articles.title: Top 10 Unsolved Mysteries in the World That Continue to Baffle Scientists
articles.description: From the Bermuda Triangle to the Wow! Signal, explore 10 unsolved mysteries that continue to puzzle scientists. These strange events and ancient secrets remain unexplained despite years of research.

articles.title: Promised American dream jobs that never...: How an Indian-origin duo ran a fake H-1B visa scheme for 2.5 years
articles.description: H-1B visa fraud: Sampath Rajidi and Sreedhar Mada, both 51 and residents of Dublin in California's East Bay, pleaded guilty this week on charges of conspiracy to commit H-1B visa fraud

articles.title: ‘Americans Can't Afford Trump Presidency’: Why Republicans Are A Worried Lot Ahead Of November Midterms
articles.description: US Energy Secretary Chris Wright on Sunday warned that it might not be until 2027 before US gas prices come back under $3 a gallon.

articles.title: I Tried This Made-in-India Tablet That Can Work Like A Laptop And Here’s My Take
articles.description: Available at a starting price of Rs 34,999 in India, the Brave Ark tries to offer a laptop-like experience, but it still feels like a work in progress.

articles.title: Anand Mahindra’s Monday motivation is a nonagenarian who proves you can change your life’s script any day
articles.description: Anand Mahindra Monday Motivation: Anand Mahindra has highlighted the inspiring journey of Prabhavati Bhagwati, a 98-year-old entrepreneur from Ahmedabad, who started her home-based venture “Nani’s Nashta” after personal loss. Her story of resilience and late-life entrepreneurship, built on traditional Gujarati food and word-of-mouth success, is now motivating people across generations to believe that it’s never too late to start anew.

articles.title: Sadhguru’s Yogic Approach To Weight Loss Focuses On Balance, Not Restriction
articles.description: Sadhguru shares a yogic approach to weight loss using millets, plant-based foods, mindful eating and proper meal gaps for sustainable health.

articles.title: TMC vs Himanta Biswa Sarma Erupts As Mamata Banerjee Row Sparks Election Commission Complaint
articles.description: A political clash has intensified in West Bengal after Trinamool Congress filed a complaint against Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma over alleged divisive remarks. The party accused him of communal statements and violating the model code, while Sarma hit back with allegations of infiltration. The controversy has heightened tensions ahead of elections, drawing attention to the Election Commission’s next move.

articles.title: Pune: Akola, Wardha touch 45°C as state reels under heat
articles.description: According to data from the IMD, Akola, Wardha have emerged among the hottest locations in the state; each recording a maximum temperature of 45 degrees Celsius.

articles.title: No-fly zone for PM, Soren misses event
articles.description: Jhargram: Jharkhand CM Hemant Soren's helicopter was unable to land in Lalgarh on Sunday due to a \"no-fly zone\" established for PM Narendra Modi's ral.

articles.title: Will induct all I-PAC staffers in TMC, none will lose job: Mamata
articles.description: Kolkata: CM Mamata Banerjee on Sunday pledged to induct I-PAC personnel into Trinamool and ensure no one loses their job as she lashed out against BJP.

articles.title: In Kol, CAPF chiefs take stock of poll security in mega meet
articles.description: Kolkata: In a first-of-its-kind exercise in a poll-bound state, the chiefs of all Central Armed Police Forces (CAPFs) held a high-level meeting in Kol.

articles.title: Stock of fake weight loss drug worth Rs 56 L seized from cab in Gurgaon, key accused managed production from home
articles.description: On Sunday, police in Gurgaon said spurious Mounjaro injections — used for diabetes management and weight loss — valued at over Rs 56 lakh were recovered from a car.

articles.title: 'My bat is the prize': Shreyas Iyer reveals dressing-room contest
articles.description: Punjab Kings secured a dominant 54-run victory over Lucknow Super Giants, propelling them to the top of the table. Captain Shreyas Iyer revealed a light-hearted six-hitting contest in the dressing room fueled the team's batting prowess, with Priyansh Arya and Cooper Connolly smashing centuries to post a season-high 254/7.

articles.title: IDF confirms viral image of soldier destroying Jesus statue in Lebanon, vows action
articles.description: An Israeli soldier was filmed destroying a Jesus statue in southern Lebanon. The Israeli military confirmed the image's authenticity. They stated the soldier's actions were serious and did not align with their values. An investigation is underway, and disciplinary action will follow. The IDF is also working to help restore the damaged statue.

articles.title: PM Modi steps up attack on TMC in Bengal rally blitz, says BJP will form govt
articles.description: Addressing rallies in Purulia, Bankura, Jhargram, and West Midnapore’s Belda, Modi said the BJP will come to power in the state after the two-phase elections.

articles.title: Is Fernando Mendoza single? Expected No. 1 pick in the 2026 NFL Draft makes it clear
articles.description: Fernando Mendoza is set to go No. 1 overall in the 2026 NFL Draft, with the Las Vegas Raiders widely expected to select him. His early involvement in the team’s offensive system suggests strong internal confidence in his role. While draft night approaches, Mendoza remains grounded, opting for a quiet celebration in Florida and maintaining a distraction-free routine. His focus and preparation have positioned him as a franchise-ready quarterback even before his name is officially called.

articles.title: Iran warns Strait of Hormuz security has a cost amid US tensions
articles.description: Iran's VP warns that security in the Strait of Hormuz isn't free, linking it to unrestricted Iranian oil exports. The warning follows the US seizure of an Iranian vessel, with Tehran vowing retaliation for the 'maritime piracy'.

articles.title: Annamalai urges votes for EPS, recalls Jayalalithaa's Srirangam win
articles.description: BJP leader K Annamalai campaigned in Tiruchirappalli, urging the public to vote for the NDA alliance and make Edappadi K. Palaniswami the Chief Minister again. EPS is contesting from his stronghold, Edappadi constituency.
